title: GLP-1 Receptor Agonist: 2026 Clinical Evidence Summary
snippet: Phase III data shows 15% mean reduction in HbA1c and 8.5kg average weight loss at 52 weeks. Demonstrates superior outcomes versus standard care in T2DM patients with high CV risk.

title: HIV Medication Adherence: HealthMachine Digital Pathway Guide
snippet: HealthMachine HIV pathway supports 100,000+ patients in England. Reduces missed doses by 34% at 6 months. Integrates with NHS systems. Clinician dashboard included.

title: SGLT2 Inhibitors in Heart Failure: 12-Month Real-World Outcomes
snippet: Real-world analysis of 4,200 patients shows 28% reduction in CV hospitalisations with SGLT2 therapy. HFrEF and HFpEF subgroups both demonstrate significant benefit.

title: Mental Health Digital Support Toolkit: HCP Reference Guide
snippet: Comprehensive guide covering digital CBT pathways, medication adherence tools, and peer support networks. Includes referral criteria, onboarding steps, and outcome tracking.

title: Pregnancy Care AI Recommendation Engine: Clinical Validation Data
snippet: Validated across 12,000 pregnancies. AI-powered recommendations reduce preterm birth risk flagging time by 40%. HCPs report 85% confidence in AI-generated alerts. Integrated into midwife workflow.

title: GLP-1 Patient Counselling Guide: HCP Conversation Framework
snippet: Structured 5-point conversation framework for initiating GLP-1 therapy discussions. Covers patient selection criteria, common objections, side effect management, and adherence support strategies.

title: U=U: Undetectable = Untransmittable — HCP Education and Messaging Kit
snippet: Science-backed U=U messaging resources for HCPs. Includes patient discussion guides, shareable infographics, and evidence summaries. Endorsed by leading HIV clinical societies.

title: Cardiovascular Risk Calculator: Clinician Portal Access Guide
snippet: Interactive CV risk stratification tool integrated into the HealthMachine clinician portal. Calculates 10-year MACE risk. Instant patient-level reporting. Already deployed across 18 NHS trusts.

title: Oncology Patient Symptom Tracker: Digital Solution Overview
snippet: Real-time patient symptom reporting with clinical alert thresholds. Reduces unplanned hospital admissions by 22%. Compatible with major EMR systems. Piloted across 8 cancer centres.

title: Respiratory Adherence Digital Programme: Outcomes & Enrolment Guide
snippet: Digital inhaler adherence programme with remote HCP monitoring. 67% reduction in rescue inhaler use at 6 months. Patient-facing app with daily check-ins and inhaler technique video guides.

title: Webinar Invitation: AI in Metabolics — Next Frontiers in Endocrinology (April 2026)
snippet: Exclusive webinar featuring 3 leading KOLs discussing AI-powered metabolic disease management. April 15, 2026. CME-accredited. Interactive Q&A session. Limited places — early registration recommended.

title: Mental Health Referral Pathway Decision Card
snippet: One-page laminated decision tool for GPs and psychiatrists. Covers triage criteria, digital intervention thresholds, referral pathways, and crisis escalation protocols.

title: HIV Quarterly Clinical Update Newsletter — Q1 2026
snippet: Q1 2026 HIV clinical highlights: updated BHIVA guidelines summary, U=U awareness campaign results, HealthMachine HIV pathway 12-month outcome data, and upcoming HIV conference calendar.

title: Oncology Digital Patient Journey Mapping: Benchmark Report 2025
snippet: Cross-centre analysis of 3,400 oncology patient journeys. Identifies 6 critical digital intervention points. Benchmarks adherence, PRO collection rates, and unplanned admission triggers across therapy types.

title: Maternal Health Monitoring App: HCP Onboarding & Clinical Integration Guide
snippet: Step-by-step HCP onboarding guide for the maternal health monitoring app. Covers patient enrolment, AI alert configuration, clinical dashboard setup, and integration with hospital systems.
